title: Assertions should not be made at the end of blocks expecting an exception
description: Assertions should not be made at the end of blocks that are expected to raise an exception.
message: Assertion found at the end of a block expecting an exception.
recommendation: Move the assertion to a try-except block or handle the exception appropriately.

noncompliant.description: Assertion at the end of a try block.

why_is_this_an_issue: Assertions are for verifying expected states, not for handling exceptions. Using assertions in exception handling can make it difficult to understand the real cause of an error and lead to unexpected behavior.
how_to_fix: Move the assertion to a try-except block and handle the exception appropriately.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the AST node kind is either 'Try' or 'Finally'.
